title: Red pvp cobweb
description: Bright red cobweb texture with clean white outline for better visibility and PvP clarity. Lightweight, smooth and FPS-friendly.
body:
Red Cobweb Texture Pack is a simple and clean improvement over the default cobweb.

It replaces the normal cobweb with a bright red version combined with a clear white outline, making it much easier to see in-game. This is especially useful for PvP, parkour, and survival situations where visibility matters.

✨ Features:
• Bright red cobweb for high visibility  
• Clean white outline for sharp edges  
• No FPS drop – optimized for low-end devices  
• Works perfectly in all dimensions (Overworld, Nether, End)  
• Vanilla-friendly design  

🎮 Use Cases:
• PvP gameplay  
• Traps & survival builds  
• Better visibility in dark areas  

⚡ Performance:
This texture pack is extremely lightweight and does not affect performance.

📦 Installation:
1. Download the pack  
2. Move it to your resourcepacks folder  
3. Enable it in-game  

👤 Credits:
Created by ItsAnshuXD
